tasks.label: Run App
tasks.detail: Compiles bin/app and starts the HTTP API server.

tasks.label: Create & Populate DB
tasks.detail: Creates the database if absent (or drops the tabula schema if it exists), then loads TABULA data from the Excel workbook.

tasks.label: Build All
tasks.detail: Compiles all binaries (app, build_db, validate) into bin/.

tasks.label: Validate
tasks.detail: Compiles bin/validate and runs the accuracy check against the database (must pass ±2.5%).
